Definition: A URL that points to the actual data download (not the landing page, but the thing that triggers a download)

The format of the data download, expressed as a MIME type. 
 For example, a NetCDF file would have a value of "application/x-netcdf" 
 For a list of common MIME types, see: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Guides/MIME_types/Common_types 
 If you can't find it in the list, search around with strings like "What's the MIME type of a [X] file?"
